title: ApplicantStatus
description: Lifecycle status of an Applicant. Terminal states: REJECTED, WITHDRAWN, CREDENTIALED, SUSPENDED.

DRAFT.description: Applicant record created but not yet submitted for review.

SUBMITTED.description: Applicant or related application has been submitted for review.

UNDER_REVIEW.description: A reviewer is actively evaluating the applicant.

PENDING_INFORMATION.description: Additional information or evidence is required from the applicant.

APPROVED.description: Applicant is approved and ready for credential issuance.

WITHDRAWN.description: Applicant was withdrawn by requester or administrator.

CREDENTIALED.description: Credential issuance completed for the applicant.

SUSPENDED.description: Applicant is suspended pending remediation or investigation.
